title: rehmannia glutinosa var. japonica
intro: Rehmannia glutinosa var. japonica, also known as Japanese Rehmannia or Di Huang, is a type of plant belonging to the saxifragaceae family. It has been traditionally used in East Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Rehmannia glutinosa var. japonica include its ability to nourish and tonify the blood, calm the nervous system, and promote longevity. Rehmannia glutinosa var. japonica is often prepared as a decoction or a tea, and it may also be processed into a powder or a tincture for use in traditional herbal remedies.
